title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 16–19, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't worry... within five minutes, I'll...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Kill all of you!! With no except- Tions!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Damn him... I... I will kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's still alive! You were too nice...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Must be because his blubber is too thick...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This guy is trouble- some...!! He could crack the ground so easily before...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What will happen after he's power- Ed up?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is my chance! I have to go and wake him up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: really! How can he still be sleeping when we're in grave danger!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing, sly little girl!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Everyone is fighting with wounds and this guy just sleeps!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
